zh-CN.title: 为什么这个结果可信
zh-CN.body: 这份报告同时看四个维度、维度之间的差距、答题质量和内容路线。它不是只用一个总分判断你。
bullets: 四维信号：SA / ER / EM / RM
差距信号：最强维度与发展杠杆
质量信号：本次结果的解释置信度
路线信号：最相关场景和行动处方

en.title: Why this result is interpretable
en.body: This report looks at the four dimensions, the gaps between them, response quality, and the selected content route. It does not reduce you to one score.
bullets: Dimension signals: SA / ER / EM / RM
Gap signals: strongest dimension and development lever
Quality signal: interpretation confidence
Route signal: relevant scenes and action prescription

zh-CN.title: 30 秒读法
zh-CN.body: 先记住一句核心模式，再看一个证据点，最后只选一个行动。不要一口气把整份报告当成性格判决。

en.title: How to read this in 30 seconds
en.body: Remember one core pattern, check one evidence point, then choose one action. Do not treat the whole report as a verdict on your personality.

zh-CN.title: 现实验证法
zh-CN.body: 未来一周观察三件事：你最先读到谁的情绪、你是否能说清边界、你事后恢复需要多久。

en.title: Reality check
en.body: For the next week, observe three things: whose emotion you notice first, whether you can state a boundary, and how long recovery takes afterward.

zh-CN.title: 证据如何支持这个结果
zh-CN.body: 这个模块把“均衡整合型”从一句描述拆成可观察的证据和可练习的动作。
bullets: Four dimensions high or upper-stable; no severe gap.
复杂对话里，你更容易同时顾及事实、情绪和关系目标。
优势太均衡时，你可能低估持续恢复和边界维护的必要性。
zh-CN.what_this_does_not_mean: 它不说明你在所有场景都会这样，也不适合替代现实反馈。
zh-CN.next_read: 继续查看现实场景和行动处方。

en.title: How the evidence supports this result
en.body: This module turns Integrated Balance from a label into observable evidence and practiceable moves.
bullets: Four dimensions high or upper-stable; no severe gap.
In complex conversations, you are more likely to hold the facts, the emotions, and the relationship goal at the same time.
When things are going well, you may underestimate how much recovery and boundary maintenance still matter.
en.what_this_does_not_mean: It does not mean you act this way in every situation, and it should not replace real-world feedback.
en.next_read: Continue to the reality scenes and action prescription.

zh-CN.title: 证据如何支持这个结果
zh-CN.body: 这个模块把“高共情，低恢复”从一句描述拆成可观察的证据和可练习的动作。
bullets: EM high; ER low or medium-low.
你能让别人感到被理解，尤其在对方情绪明显但没有说清楚时。
你可能把“我理解你”滑向“我必须替你扛住”。
zh-CN.what_this_does_not_mean: 它不说明你在所有场景都会这样，也不适合替代现实反馈。
zh-CN.next_read: 继续查看现实场景和行动处方。

en.title: How the evidence supports this result
en.body: This module turns High Empathy, Low Recovery from a label into observable evidence and practiceable moves.
bullets: EM high; ER low or medium-low.
You can make people feel understood, especially when their emotion is obvious but not clearly stated.
You may slide from “I understand this” into “I have to carry this with you or for you.”
en.what_this_does_not_mean: It does not mean you act this way in every situation, and it should not replace real-world feedback.
en.next_read: Continue to the reality scenes and action prescription.

你能比很多人更快识别自己的情绪线索。

en.title: How the evidence supports this result
en.body: This module turns Aware, Not Yet Settled from a label into observable evidence and practiceable moves.
bullets: SA high; ER low or medium-low.
You can often identify your emotional cues faster than many people.
Clear awareness without regulation steps can turn into replaying, overanalyzing, or emotional fatigue.
en.what_this_does_not_mean: It does not mean you act this way in every situation, and it should not replace real-world feedback.
en.next_read: Continue to the reality scenes and action prescription.

en.what_this_does_not_mean: It does not mean you act this way in every situation, and it should not replace real-world feedback.

bullets: RM high; SA low or medium-low.
You often keep conversations going without letting the room collapse emotionally.
You may realize late that you were uncomfortable much earlier.
en.what_this_does_not_mean: It does not mean you act this way in every situation, and it should not replace real-world feedback.
en.next_read: Continue to the reality scenes and action prescription.

en.next_read: Continue to the reality scenes and action prescription.

bullets: ER high; RM high.

bullets: ER high; RM high.
You can be the person who cools the room down and organizes the next step.
You may underestimate that others sometimes need emotional acknowledgment, not only forward motion.
en.what_this_does_not_mean: It does not mean you act this way in every situation, and it should not replace real-world feedback.
en.next_read: Continue to the reality scenes and action prescription.
